default:
Analyze this ASMR video frame. Identify:
1. Action (pick_up, put_down, brush, tap, rub, scratch, rotate, hold_up, squeeze, shake, close_up, idle)
2. Props visible (wood_brush, makeup_brush, ear_pick, paper, glass_bottle, plastic_bag, sponge, spray_bottle)
3. Scene type (front_view, close_up, hand_focus, dual_ear)
Return JSON: {"action": "...", "props": [...], "scene": "..."}
detailed:
You are analyzing frames from an ASMR video. For each frame, provide a detailed analysis:

ACTIONS: pick_up, put_down, brush, tap, rub, scratch, rotate, hold_up, squeeze, shake, close_up, move_away, switch_hands, idle

PROPS: wood_brush, makeup_brush, ear_pick, paper, glass_bottle, plastic_bag, sponge, spray_bottle, towel, cotton_swab, tuning_fork, mic_cover, scissors, comb, candle

SCENES: front_view, close_up, hand_focus, dual_ear, side_view, top_down, dark

Return ONLY JSON format:
{
  "action": "brush",
  "action_confidence": 0.95,
  "props": ["wood_brush"],
  "props_confidence": 0.90,
  "scene": "hand_focus",
  "scene_confidence": 0.85,
  "description": "hand holding wooden brush near microphone"
}
cn:
分析这张ASMR视频帧。识别：
1. 动作类型：拿起、放下、刷/涂抹、敲击、摩擦、刮擦、旋转、展示、挤压、摇晃、靠近、远离、换手、静止
2. 可见道具：木刷、化妆刷、掏耳勺、纸张、玻璃瓶、塑料袋、海绵、喷雾瓶、毛巾、棉签、音叉、麦克风套、剪刀、梳子、蜡烛
3. 场景类型：正面、特写、手部、双耳、侧面、俯视、暗光

返回JSON：{"action": "...", "props": [...], "scene": "..."}
